What We Offer
COMPLETE POOL
CARE SERVICES

From routine weekly maintenance to emergency green-to-clean rescues — we handle it all so you don't have to.

🧹

Weekly Pool Cleaning

Regular skimming, brushing, vacuuming, and chemical balancing to keep your pool consistently clean and safe all season long.

🧪

Chemical Balancing

Precise water chemistry management including pH, alkalinity, chlorine, and shock treatments to maintain a healthy, safe swim environment.

🌿

Green-to-Clean Service

Has your pool turned green? We'll have it back to crystal clear in no time with our intensive algae treatment and restoration process.

🔧

Equipment Repair & Maintenance

Pump, filter, heater, and automation repairs done right. We diagnose issues fast and get your equipment running at peak performance.

🔍

Pool Inspections

Comprehensive pool inspections for new homebuyers or existing pool owners — know exactly what you're working with before issues arise.

💧

Filter Cleaning & Replacement

Clean or replace your cartridge, sand, or DE filter to ensure optimal water flow, clarity, and filtration efficiency.

🔬

Water Testing & Analysis

Detailed water testing with a full breakdown of your pool's chemical composition and a personalized treatment recommendation.

🌊

One-Time Deep Clean

Moving in, prepping for a party, or just need a reset? Our one-time deep clean service gets your pool guest-ready fast.

🏠

Vacation & Seasonal Service

Going out of town? We'll watch over your pool while you're away — maintaining chemistry, cleanliness, and equipment health.

Why Pure Pool Solutions
WE DON'T JUST CLEAN.
WE CARE.

We treat every pool like it's our own — with honest communication, reliable service, and real expertise.

🏊

CRYSTAL CLEAR
EVERY TIME

01

Certified & Professional

Our technicians are CPO certified and fully insured, so you get true expertise — not a neighbor with a test kit.

02

Transparent Communication

We send visit reports with photos after every service. You'll always know exactly what was done and why.

03

Locally Owned & Operated

We're Phoenix locals — we understand the Valley's heat, water conditions, and what your pool really needs.

04

Satisfaction Guaranteed

Not happy with a visit? We'll come back and make it right — no questions asked, no hassle.

Simple Process
HOW IT WORKS

Getting started is easy. We handle everything from your first call to a sparkling clean pool.

1

Request a Quote

Fill out our quick form or give us a call. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

2

Free Assessment

We visit your pool, assess its needs, and build you a custom service plan.

3

We Get to Work

Your tech arrives on schedule, does a thorough job, and sends you a report.

4

Enjoy Your Pool

That's it. Swim. Relax. We handle the rest on a schedule that works for you.
